heading: American Sections, International Joint Commission, United States and Canada; funds for representation expenses and official entertainment within the United States
label: 2689 American Sections, International Joint Commission, United States and Canada; funds for representation expenses and official entertainment within the United States
text: Each fiscal year (beginning with fiscal year 1977), the Secretary of State may use funds appropriated for the American Sections, International Joint Commission, United States and Canada, for representation expenses and official entertainment within the United States for such American Sections.
notes: Amendments1978— struck out “not to exceed $1,500 of the” after “the Secretary of State may use”.Pub. L. 95–426

Effective Date of 1978 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 95–426, title I, § 110(b)92 Stat. 967Oct. 7, 1978“The amendment made by this section [amending this section] shall take effect on .”October 1, 1978
